    CircularFifoQueue<E> - com.zenith.util.struct中的类
    CircularFifoQueue is a first-in first-out queue with a fixed size that replaces its oldest element if full.
    CircularFifoQueue() - 类的构造器 com.zenith.util.struct.CircularFifoQueue
    Constructor that creates a queue with the default size of 32.
    CircularFifoQueue(int) - 类的构造器 com.zenith.util.struct.CircularFifoQueue
    Constructor that creates a queue with the specified size.
    CircularFifoQueue(Collection) - 类的构造器 com.zenith.util.struct.CircularFifoQueue
    Constructor that creates a queue from the specified collection.

    ClickResult.LeftClickResult - com.zenith.feature.player中的类
    Left click -> block start destroy (return block position and instance) -> block continue destroy (return block position and instance) -> entity attack (return entity instance) -> swing Right click -> use item on block (return block position and instance) -> use item on entity (return entity instance) -> use item

    ClientConfigurationEvent - com.zenith.event.client中的记录类
     
    ClientConfigurationEvent() - 记录类的构造器 com.zenith.event.client.ClientConfigurationEvent
    创建 ClientConfigurationEvent 记录类的实例。
    ClientConfigurationEvent.Entered - com.zenith.event.client中的记录类
    Fired when the client has entered the configuration phase, on having sent the ServerboundConfigurationAcknowledgedPacket
    ClientConfigurationEvent.Entering - com.zenith.event.client中的记录类
    Fired right before the client enters the configuration phase, on receiving the ClientboundStartConfigurationPacket This does *not* get fired on initial login->configuration state switch, only when reconfiguring
    ClientConfigurationEvent.Exited - com.zenith.event.client中的记录类
    Fired when the client has exited the configuration phase, on having sent the ServerboundFinishConfigurationPacket
    ClientConfigurationEvent.Exiting - com.zenith.event.client中的记录类
    Fired right before the client exits the configuration phase, on receiving the ClientboundFinishConfigurationPacket

    fullyPassable(CalculationContext, int, int, int) - 类中的静态方法 com.zenith.feature.pathfinder.movement.MovementHelper

    inImageRuntimeCode() - 类中的静态方法 com.zenith.util.ImageInfo
    Returns true if (at the time of the call) code is executing at image runtime.

    MIN_DIST_PATH - 类中的静态变量 com.zenith.feature.pathfinder.calc.AbstractNodeCostSearch
    If a path goes less than 5 blocks and doesn't make it to its goal, it's not worth considering.
    MIN_IMPROVEMENT - 类中的静态变量 com.zenith.feature.pathfinder.calc.AbstractNodeCostSearch
    there are floating point errors caused by random combinations of traverse and diagonal over a flat area that means that sometimes there's a cost improvement of like 10 ^ -16 it's not worth the time to update the costs, decrease-key the heap, potentially repropagate, etc

    创建 PlayerConfigurationEvent 记录类的实例。
    PlayerConfigurationEvent.Entered - com.zenith.event.player中的记录类
    Fired when the player has entered the initial login -> configuration phase, on zenith having received the ServerboundLoginAcknowledgedPacket
    PlayerConfigurationEvent.Exited - com.zenith.event.player中的记录类
    Fired when the player has exited the configuration phase, on zenith receiving the ServerboundFinishConfigurationPacket
    PlayerConfigurationEvent.Exiting - com.zenith.event.player中的记录类
    Fired right before the client exits the initial configuration phase, right before zenith sends the ClientboundFinishConfigurationPacket

    PROPERTY_IMAGE_CODE_KEY - 类中的静态变量 com.zenith.util.ImageInfo
    Holds the string that is the name of the system property providing information about the context in which code is currently executing.
    PROPERTY_IMAGE_CODE_VALUE_BUILDTIME - 类中的静态变量 com.zenith.util.ImageInfo
    Holds the string that will be returned by the system property for ImageInfo.PROPERTY_IMAGE_CODE_KEY if code is executing in the context of image building (e.g. in a static initializer of class that will be contained in the image).
    PROPERTY_IMAGE_CODE_VALUE_RUNTIME - 类中的静态变量 com.zenith.util.ImageInfo
    Holds the string that will be returned by the system property for ImageInfo.PROPERTY_IMAGE_CODE_KEY if code is executing at image runtime.
    PROPERTY_IMAGE_KIND_KEY - 类中的静态变量 com.zenith.util.ImageInfo
    Name of the system property that holds if this image is built as a shared library or an executable.
    PROPERTY_IMAGE_KIND_VALUE_EXECUTABLE - 类中的静态变量 com.zenith.util.ImageInfo
    Holds the string that will be returned by the system property for ImageInfo.PROPERTY_IMAGE_KIND_KEY if image is an executable.
    PROPERTY_IMAGE_KIND_VALUE_SHARED_LIBRARY - 类中的静态变量 com.zenith.util.ImageInfo
    Holds the string that will be returned by the system property for ImageInfo.PROPERTY_IMAGE_KIND_KEY if image is a shared library.
    Property.Value<T> - com.zenith.mc.block.properties.api中的记录类

    Requeue - com.zenith.module.impl中的类
    On 2b2t, if we stop responding to KeepAlive packets we will get sent back to queue not to the end of the queue, but as if we were doing a reconnect queue skip so this can be useful for resetting the player state without having to do a full reconnect
